2605.10640.title: Towards Understanding Continual Factual Knowledge Acquisition of Language Models: From Theory to Algorithm
2605.10640.paper_summary: Continual Pre-Training (CPT) is essential for enabling Language Models (LMs) to integrate new knowledge without erasing old. While classical CPT techniques like data replay have become the standard paradigm, the mechanisms underlying how LMs acquire and retain facts over time, termed as continual Factual Knowledge Acquisition (cFKA), remain unclear. In this work, we present a theoretical framework that characterizes the training dynamics of cFKA using a single-layer Transformer, offering a unified explanation for the behavior of representative CPT methods. Our analysis reveals that regularization-based methods merely adjust the convergence rate of parameters without altering the inherent forgetting tendency, whereas data replay methods succeed in shifting convergence dynamics and stabilizing pretrained knowledge. Building on these insights, we propose a novel generative data replay approach, called \textbf{S}electing \textbf{T}okens via attenti\textbf{O}n \textbf{C}ontribution~(STOC), which identifies influential factual snippets to guide replay data generation. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets validate our findings and demonstrate that STOC effectively enhances cFKA by mitigating catastrophic forgetting.
2605.10640.paper_summary_zh: 持續預訓練（CPT）對於使語言模型（LMs）能夠整合新知識而不抹去舊知識至關重要。雖然像數據重播這樣的經典CPT技術已成為標準範式，但語言模型如何隨時間獲取和保留事實的機制，即持續事實知識獲取（cFKA），仍然不清楚。在這項工作中，我們提出了一個理論框架，使用單層Transformer來描述cFKA的訓練動態，為代表性的CPT方法的行為提供了統一的解釋。我們的分析顯示，基於正則化的方法僅僅調整參數的收斂速度，而不改變固有的遺忘傾向，而數據重播方法則成功地改變了收斂動態並穩定了預訓練知識。在這些見解的基礎上，我們提出了一種新穎的生成數據重播方法，稱為\textbf{S}electing \textbf{T}okens via attenti\textbf{O}n \textbf{C}ontribution~(STOC)，該方法識別有影響力的事實片段以指導重播數據生成。對合成和現實世界數據集的廣泛實驗驗證了我們的發現，並展示了STOC通過減輕災難性遺忘有效地增強了cFKA。
2605.10640.author: Haoyu Wang et.al.
2605.10640.authors: Haoyu Wang, Yifan Shang, Zhongxiang Sun, Weijie Yu, Xiao Zhang, Jun Xu
